shadows.name: no-shadow-baseline
shadows.purpose: Default flat posture across panels and controls

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion action used for email outreach.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-soft); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent) 68%, white); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--surface-raised); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--stroke-strong); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent) 68%, white); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field for outreach brief collection.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--surface-raised); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--stroke-strong); border-radius: 2px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent) 68%, white); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: var(--accent); }

components.name: Raised Panel
components.description: Structured container for profile and summary data.
components.html:
OPERATING PROFILE

Senior operators on each engagement.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--surface-raised); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--stroke-strong); border-radius: 2px; padding: 24px; font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-label { margin: 0 0 10px 0; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel-text { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: Top-level bar with identity and always-available CTA.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 14px 20px; border: 1px solid var(--stroke-subtle); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--surface-raised) 88%, transparent); font-family: Barlow, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-block; border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 2px; background: var(--accent); color: var(--ink); padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent-soft); } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent) 68%, white); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This design language behaves like a technical briefing surface. It uses controlled dark neutrals, strict borders, and concise typography to communicate operational competence to engineering leaders. Accent color remains scarce and conversion-focused, preserving trust and hierarchy.

rules.name: Accent Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Accent is for actions and high-intent links, not ambient decoration.

rules.name: Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Structure is conveyed through tone and stroke before shadow.

dos: Do keep CTA endpoints visible in repeated, predictable locations.
Do preserve high-contrast text and explicit focus indicators.
Do keep message hierarchy concise and technically specific.
donts: Don't resemble crypto or blockchain marketing language or visuals.
Don't use neon accents, speculative motifs, token metaphors, or hype styling.
Don't use gradient text, heavy glass effects, or decorative side-stripe accents.
